ratings.comment: Very inclusive environment. Open to other POVs. Passionate about research. Invited guest speakers. Provides additional materials/opportunities to enhance learning. Small group discussions w/ one presentation. Final 5pg paper on topic of choice. Flexible & available outside of class. Grades on quality while considering abilities. Highly recommend.

I took her English 116 class last semester. Her writing comment is detailed and reasonable. It is definitely not difficult to get credit. Grading is not strict. Excellent instructor. Want to learn a lot and still pass? Take her class !
Lots of homework, but nice teacher
